title: Fresh Meat Slicer Cleaver, Thickness Adjustable 2 or 4 mm, 17 in 1 Stainless Steel Manual Fresh Meat Cutter Food Slicer, Fresh Meat Slicing Shredding, Not for Frozen or Deil Meat (Grey)
features: 17 BLADES: The meat slicer set is a great tool for cutting, equipped with 17 blades for efficient slicing, it can cut fresh meat into 18 thin slices in one go. Suitable for all kinds of fresh meat including pork, beef, chicken and salmon, making your meal preparation easier. (Not suitable for frozen and skimmed meats)

ADJUSTABLE THICKNESS: The manual meat slicer has two sets of blades that provide the flexibility to slice meat 2mm or 4mm thick, depending on your preference. You can easily re-insert the meat into the container for additional cuts to create strips or chunks.

ABS+PP+STAINLESS STEEL: The blade of the multifunctional manual meat slicer is made of high-quality stainless steel and features a sharp 8° for professional-grade cutting results. This ensures that you effortlessly shred meat and get consistent portions every time.

SUCTION CUP DESIGN: The shredder is designed with sturdy suction cups on the bottom of the machine, allowing it to hold firmly to smooth surfaces during This innovative feature prevents any wobbling or movement, ensuring a safe and stable slicing experience as you prepare your favorite dishes.

USER-FRIENDLY DESIGN: This meat and food cutter is intuitively designed to be easy to use for home cooks of all skill levels. Compact and powerful, it eliminates the hassle of traditional slicing methods, making meal preparation faster and more enjoyable while enhancing your culinary creativity.
WITH CLEANING BRUSH: Our meat slicer set comes with a cleaning brush for easy cleaning and hassle-free maintenance. Its compact size and wall-mounted design saves valuable kitchen space.
